source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Tongass Narrows, Ketchikan, Alaska
description: Historic gelatin silver postcard showing Tongass Narrows at twilight — the deep-water channel between Revillagigedo and Gravina Islands that serves as Ketchikan's working waterfront. Produced by the Thwaites Studio, Ketchikan, card number 5809, between 1900 and 1940.
alt: Historic sepia postcard of Tongass Narrows at twilight with forested shoreline
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov and visually confirmed
